3265510.name: Nocky el Armadillo
3265510.description:
What is it?

A classic 2D platformer with unique features that add complexity and variety to the gameplay. Master the controls to overcome traps and enemies.

Explore diverse locations

Nocky's journey will take you through savannas, deserts, caves, the sea, and even the sky. Each area is unique and more dangerous than the last!

The beginning

New icon of 2D platforms that will try to fight to gain a space in the hearts of lovers of the genre!

Join him on his fascinating adventure and celebrate his birth together!

Argument

A tragic event, carried out by a group of poachers, shakes the calm life of our emblematic protagonist that will lead him to travel through African lands in search of revenge.

Remembering

Nocky el Armadillo seeks to bring back the epic adventures we live on 16-bit consoles, becoming the new star that conquers the new generation of young players and pleases the most veteran players.

Soundtrack

The wonderful soundtrack is made by composer Álvaro García Hernández “Lautenor”.
3265510.supported_languages: 英语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 加泰罗尼亚语, 法语, 意大利语, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙
